claim: Threat-actor names represent activity clusters rather than guaranteed legal identities.
Alias and group boundaries can overlap or differ across vendors, so similarity alone should not trigger automatic merging.
Microsoft contributed 163 source records to this catalog build.
Google Threat Intelligence/Mandiant contributed 41 public APT designators to this catalog build.
MISP Galaxy provided the broadest source corpus in this build with 1,017 threat-actor records.
